---
title: "Ryan Nielsen"
name: "Ryan Nielsen"
image: "/images/profile_pics/ryan_nielsen.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Behavioral and physiological ecology of jumping spiders"
location: "**Research location:** Wyoming"
dates: "**Dates:** 2023"
category: "Alumni"
category_order: "3"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
